final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
Current interest-bearing liabilities - vendor notes and additional purchase prices

variables.notes: Selected the explicit non-lease current debt line plus an additional current interest-bearing liabilities line. Manual review due to some ambiguity around whether 'vendor notes and additional purchase prices' are fully within baseline STD and whether any overlap exists in certain years.
